Dependencies.Dependency: @opencode-ai/plugin 1.3.17 for typed OpenCode plugin API, hooks, config mutation, and custom tool helpers.
@opencode-ai/sdk 1.3.17 for OpenCode client types and Guardian/runtime interactions.
citty 0.2.2 for CLI command tree and argument parsing.
jsonc-parser 3.3.1 for JSONC-aware config parsing and edits.

Tooling.Tool: oxlint with denied warnings for source linting.
bunx @osovv/grace-cli@rc for GRACE 4 status and lint validation during this migration.

ConfigLayout.OpenCode: OpenCode config remains in opencode.json or opencode.jsonc under OpenCode-managed global/project paths. Model-bearing fields may store vv-role:* references and are resolved by ModelRolesPlugin at runtime.
ConfigLayout.Vvoc: vvoc-managed settings live in $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/vvoc/vvoc.json or project-local .vvoc/vvoc.json depending on scope. Project-local .vvoc also stores managed agents, skills, and spec packages.
ConfigLayout.Data: Persisted data lives under $XDG_DATA_HOME/vvoc, including workflow persistence.

TestingStack.ModuleLevel: bun test targeted files for lib, command, plugin, workflow, secrets, hashline, and release automation modules.
TestingStack.WaveLevel: bun run typecheck, bun run lint, bun run fmt:check, bun test.
TestingStack.PhaseLevel: bun run check, bun run build, bun run pack:check, bun run release:check before release-sensitive work.

Observability.Logger: OpenCode app log through client.app.log plus Guardian best-effort debug file in /tmp where applicable.
Observability.RequiredFields: service, level, message, requestID, sessionID where runtime context provides them.
Observability.Redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, raw tokens, or high-risk payloads outside bounded existing Guardian truncation policy.

OperationalConstraints.Constraint: Prefer existing project libraries and established repository patterns.
Use Bun commands directly for project checks and bunx for grace-cli in this migration.
Do not edit generated dist output manually.
Root package exports must stay valid for @osovv/vv-opencode and plugin subpaths.
Publishing remains manual from terminal with npm publish; do not add CI publish workflows unless explicitly requested.

DeliveryShape.Shape: One public npm package exporting GuardianPlugin, HashlineEditPlugin, ModelRolesPlugin, SystemContextInjectionPlugin, WorkflowPlugin, and SecretsRedactionPlugin, plus a Bun CLI binary named vvoc.
DeliveryShape.ManualReview: docs/technology.xml mentions MemoryPlugin, but current package exports and src/plugins do not contain a Memory plugin. This was migrated as stale legacy drift, not current state.
